summary: Added a lightweight Bash workflow contract check for key CI and nightly GitHub Actions invariants, exposed it as a just target, and wired it into just check.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: CI workflow contract checks cover required triggers, top-level contents read permission, Linux and macOS jobs, explicit job timeouts, required actions, Rust components, and standard run commands.
Nightly workflow contract checks cover scheduled and manual triggers, top-level contents read and security events write permissions, explicit job timeout, and deep-check commands.
Missing required workflow fields produce file-scoped errors via report_error.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-workflow-contract-check/commands.log records a temporary missing merge_group smoke test failing with a file-scoped error.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: The check is wired into just check through just workflow-contract-check.
Evidence and qd reports are recorded.
No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, or latency claim is made.

commandsRun.command: temporary copy negative smoke test with missing merge_group

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository workflow contract tooling only; no product runtime validation is required.
